title: Welcome and Basics
summary: A quick intro to the site, what you can find here, and how to navigate it.

sections.heading: Welcome
body: Close Enough Fabrication is a public portfolio of off-road fabrication work, project highlights, and build notes.
Everything here is designed to be easy to browse and easy to share as new work is completed.

sections.heading: How to navigate
bullets: Projects shows full build pages with photos and details.
Videos collects walkthroughs, quick demos, and highlights.
Contact is the best place to start a new request.

sections.heading: What to expect
body: Some older builds are intentionally brief when the work predates this site.
If you do not see what you need, reach out and we can point you in the right direction.

title: Projects and Videos
summary: What is included on project pages and video pages, plus what to expect from updates.

sections.heading: Projects
body: Project pages include a short summary, photos, and a link when there is more to share.
Some entries are highlights only when the work was completed before the site launched.

sections.heading: Videos
body: Video pages highlight finished work, quick test runs, or specific fabrication steps.
Not every project gets a video, but we add them when it helps explain the build.

sections.heading: Updates
body: Updates are posted as builds wrap or when there is something worth sharing.
If you are looking for a specific project update, feel free to ask.

title: Requests and Collaboration
summary: What helps us quote or plan a build, and how to reach us.

sections.heading: What to include
bullets: Vehicle year, make, model, and any existing modifications.
Goal of the build (trail use, daily driver, recovery, overlanding, etc.).
Timeline and any hard deadlines if they exist.
Budget range if you are comfortable sharing it.

sections.heading: Getting started
steps: Send a short description through the Contact page.
We will reply with next steps and availability.
Once the direction is set, we will walk through details together.

sections.heading: Helpful extras
body: Photos or a short walkaround video help us move faster during planning.

title: Policies and Safety
summary: A plain-language overview of content accuracy, safety, and privacy.

sections.heading: Content accuracy
body: We do our best to keep information current, but builds evolve and details can change.
If something looks outdated, send a note and we will correct it.

sections.heading: Safety
body: Fabrication and off-road work can be dangerous. Always use proper safety gear and verified procedures.
If you plan to replicate a build, consult a professional for your specific setup.

sections.heading: Privacy
body: We do not sell personal data. See the Privacy Policy for details.
